rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 16, 2015 line 1. Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 704.760(c) and failed to provide competent admissible value for determination of the fair market value under CCP 704.780(b). = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: TESHOME T TAREKEGN, VS. FREWWORK ABERRA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Withdraw To Amend To File The Request For Dismissal Of Complaint And Petition That Was Filed On 5-15-15
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 16, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF TESHOME TAREKEGN's Amended Motion To Withdraw To Amend To File The Request For Dismissal Of Complaint And Petition That Was Filed On 5-15-15 GRANTED in part. Plaintiff shall file an amended dismissal dismissing only defendant Elizabeth Aberra. Amended dismissal shall be filed and served no later than July 17, 2015. = (501/GLW)P
